title: ‘Netflix’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Netflix is an American subscription video on-demand over-the-top streaming service.

title: ‘Messenger’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Messenger is an American proprietary instant messaging service developed by Meta Platforms, the company that operates Facebook.

title: ‘HBO Max’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app

title: ‘Apple Wallet’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app

subtitle: Mobile app

subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Skype was a proprietary telecommunications application operated by Skype Technologies, an acquired division of Microsoft, best known for IP-based videotelephony, videoconferencing and voice calls.

title: ‘Signal’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
fact: Signal is an open-source, encrypted messaging service for instant messaging, voice calls, and video calls.

title: ‘Grab’ launches
subtitle: Mobile app
